description: Internal service dashboard for bounded technical point drilldown over ClickHouse read models. Not tenant-facing.

targets.rawSql: WITH (SELECT greatest(coalesce(max(value_avg), 1), 1) FROM telemetry_1m_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND value_avg IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter_ms(bucket_start)) AS bool_scale SELECT ts AS time, concat(point_key, ' boolean high/low') AS metric, if(value_bool, bool_scale, 0) AS value FROM telemetry_events_dedup_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND value_type = 'boolean' AND value_bool IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter_ms(ts) ORDER BY time ASC, metric ASC LIMIT 5000

SELECT bucket_start AS time, point_key AS metric, value_avg AS value FROM telemetry_1m_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND value_avg IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter_ms(bucket_start) ORDER BY bucket_start ASC, point_key ASC LIMIT 5000

panels.description: Latest values for the selected raw technical point identity.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts, tenant_id, asset_id, source_type, agent_id, source_id, point_key, value_type, coalesce(toString(value_float), toString(value_bool), value_string, value_raw) AS value, quality, source_config_revision FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) ORDER BY ts DESC, point_key ASC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Latest values

targets.rawSql: SELECT quality, count() AS events FROM telemetry_events_dedup_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter_ms(ts) GROUP BY quality ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT event_type, count() AS events FROM telemetry_events_dedup_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter_ms(ts) GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT bucket_start AS time, 'events' AS metric, sum(event_count) AS value FROM telemetry_1m_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) AND point_key IN (${point_key:singlequote}) AND $__timeFilter_ms(bucket_start) GROUP BY bucket_start ORDER BY bucket_start ASC LIMIT 1000

panels.description: Agent/source status context is empty-state tolerant when no operational status events have been seeded.

targets.rawSql: SELECT scope, tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, state, reason, ts, dashboard_state, context_source FROM (SELECT 'agent' AS scope, tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, '' AS source_id, status AS state, '' AS reason, ts, dashboard_state, context_source, sort_priority FROM (SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, status, ts, if(ts < now64(3) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE, 'stale', status) AS dashboard_state, 'agent_status_events_v1' AS context_source, 0 AS sort_priority FROM agent_status_events_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) UNION ALL SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, 'telemetry_inferred' AS status, ts, if(ts < now64(3) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE, 'stale', 'online') AS dashboard_state, 'telemetry_latest_v1' AS context_source, 1 AS sort_priority FROM (SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, max(ts) AS ts FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id)) UNION ALL SELECT 'source' AS scope, tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, state, coalesce(reason, '') AS reason, ts, dashboard_state, context_source, sort_priority FROM (SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, state, reason, ts, if(ts < now64(3) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE, 'stale', state) AS dashboard_state, 'source_connection_events_v1' AS context_source, 0 AS sort_priority FROM source_connection_events_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) UNION ALL SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, 'telemetry_inferred' AS state, 'latest telemetry freshness fallback' AS reason, ts, if(ts < now64(3) - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE, 'stale', 'connected') AS dashboard_state, 'telemetry_latest_v1' AS context_source, 1 AS sort_priority FROM (SELECT tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id, max(ts) AS ts FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) GROUP BY tenant_id, asset_id, agent_id, source_id))) ORDER BY scope ASC, sort_priority ASC, ts DESC LIMIT 40

panels.title: Runtime status context

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM telemetry_latest_v1 ORDER BY tenant_id LIMIT 200
list.name: tenant_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM telemetry_latest_v1 ORDER BY tenant_id LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT asset_id FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY asset_id LIMIT 200
list.name: asset_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT asset_id FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY asset_id LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source_type FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY source_type LIMIT 100
list.name: source_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source_type FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY source_type LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) ORDER BY agent_id LIMIT 200
list.name: agent_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT agent_id FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) ORDER BY agent_id LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source_id FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY source_id LIMIT 200
list.name: source_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source_id FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY source_id LIMIT 200

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT point_key FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY point_key LIMIT 500
list.name: point_key
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT point_key FROM telemetry_latest_v1 WHERE tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:singlequote}) AND asset_id IN (${asset_id:singlequote}) AND source_type IN (${source_type:singlequote}) AND agent_id IN (${agent_id:singlequote}) AND source_id IN (${source_id:singlequote}) ORDER BY point_key LIMIT 500

title: Telemetry Point Drilldown
